popularStory.description: During the Second Barons' War of 1264–67, William Maudit, 8th Earl of Warwick, was a supporter of King Henry III. The castle was taken in a surprise attack by the forces of Simon de Montfort, 6th Earl …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Guy de Beauchamp 10th Earl of Warwick於1272年出生在英國武斯特斯爾艾爾姆利 卡素時，他的父親William Beauchamp 9th Earl of Warwick35歲，母親Maud FitzJohn36歲。他於1305年之前與Alice de Tosny結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1300年登記服兵役。他於1298年被列為high sheriff of worcestershire 。他去世於1315年8月12日在英國瓦維其可爾沃里克沃里克 卡素享年43歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾波德斯利 帕克。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guy de Beauchamp 10th Earl of Warwick于1272年出生在英国武斯特斯爾艾爾姆利 卡素时，他的父亲William Beauchamp 9th Earl of Warwick35岁，母亲Maud FitzJohn36岁。他于1305年之前与Alice de Tosny结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1300年登记服兵役。他于1298年被列为high sheriff of worcestershire 。他去世于1315年8月12日在英国瓦維其可爾沃里克沃里克 卡素享年43岁，埋葬在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾波德斯利 帕克。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beauchamp
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Antoine, Jacques, Yves, Andre, Armand, Emile, Fernand, Marcel, Marthe, Remi, Alcide, Camille.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of several places in France, for example in Manche and Somme, that are named with Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + champ(s) ‘field, plain’ (from Latin bello campo ‘beautiful field’). In English the surname is generally pronounced Beecham . Compare Bushaw .
English: in some cases, an Anglo-Norman French adaptation of Scottish Campbell , by translation into French of the folk etymology de campo bello ‘from the fair field’.

variants.name: Beecham
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): variant of   Beauchamp  , reflecting the normal English pronunciation.

variants.name: Beachem
meanings: English (Somerset and Gloucestershire): variant of   Beauchamp  .

variants.name: Beachum
meanings: Altered form of English   Beauchamp  .

variants.name: Bagent
meanings: English:
possibly a colloquial pronunciation of Beauchamp or Beecham . Old French Beau- often appears as Be(e)- in English surnames. The -ch- has been voiced and excrescent -t has been added.

perhaps an Anglicized form of a French or Flemish surname such as Beaujean and Bejean, from Old French bel Jehan ‘handsome John’ + excrescent -t. It could have been introduced to England in the 15th or 16th century by Flemish migrants.

variants.name: Beacham
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beauchamp  .

variants.name: Campbell
meanings: Scottish: nickname from Gaelic cam ‘crooked, bent’ + beul ‘mouth’. As a result of folk etymology, the surname was often represented in Latin documents as de bello campo ‘of the fair field’, which led to the name sometimes being ‘translated’ into Anglo-Norman French as Beauchamp .
Irish (North Armagh): adopted for Gaelic Mac Cathmhaoil ‘son of Cathmhaol’ (literally ‘battle chief’): see Caulfield and Cowell .
English: variant of   Camel  , under the influence of the Scottish name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Bushaw
meanings: Americanized form of French   Beauchamp   and   Bouchard  .

variants.name: Beacom
meanings: English (Somerset) and Irish (Fermanagh): of Norman origin, a variant of   Beauchamp  .

nameMeanings.name: Guy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of a compound name starting with witu ‘wood’ or wīt ‘wide’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. In Old French initial w- regularly became gu-. The usual Norman forms of the name were Gy or Guido. In medieval Latin the same name is found as Wido. It was a popular name among the Normans, enhanced no doubt by the romance of Guy of Warwick, recounting the exploits of a folk hero of the Crusades.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Guy de Beauchamp 10th Earl of Warwick was born in 1272, in Elmley Castle, Worcestershire, England, his father, William Beauchamp 9th Earl of Warwick, was 35 and his mother, Maud FitzJohn, was 36. He married Alice de Tosny before 1305. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He registered for military service in 1300. In 1298, at the age of 26, his occupation is listed as high sheriff of worcestershire . He died on 12 August 1315, in Warwick Castle, Warwick, Warwickshire, England, at the age of 43, and was buried in Bordesley Park, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guy de Beauchamp 10th Earl of Warwick est né en 1272, à Elmley Castle, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, William Beauchamp 9th Earl of Warwick, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Maud FitzJohn, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Alice de Tosny avant 1305. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1300. En 1298, à l’âge de 26 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est high sheriff of worcestershire . Il est décédé le 12 août 1315, à Warwick Castle, Warwick, Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterré à Bordesley Park, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guy de Beauchamp 10th Earl of Warwick 1272 in Elmley Castle, Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Beauchamp 9th Earl of Warwick 35 und seine Mutter Maud FitzJohn 36. Er hat vor 1305 Alice de Tosny geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er hat sich 1300 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1298, als er 26 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als high sheriff of worcestershire  aufgeführt. Er starb am 12. August 1315 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Warwick Castle, Warwick, Warwickshire, England und wurde in Bordesley Park, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guy de Beauchamp 10th Earl of Warwick è nato il nel 1272 nel Elmley Castle, Worcestershire, England, il suo padre, William Beauchamp 9th Earl of Warwick, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Maud FitzJohn, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Alice de Tosny prima del 1305. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1300. Nel 1298, all'età di 26 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come high sheriff of worcestershire . Morì il 12 agosto 1315, nel Warwick Castle, Warwick, Warwickshire, England, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolto a Bordesley Park, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Guy de Beauchamp 10th Earl of Warwickが1272年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアエルムリー カストルで生まれた時，父William Beauchamp 9th Earl of Warwickは35歳，母Maud FitzJohnは36歳であった。1305年以前にAlice de Tosnyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1300年に兵役登録をした。1298年，26歳の時，職業はhigh sheriff of worcestershire と記録されている。彼は1315年8月12日にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアワーウィックワーウィック カストルで43歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアボルデスリー パークにて埋葬された。

ko.Warwick Castle, Warwick, Warwickshire, E: 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 워윅 워윅 카스틀
ko.lifeSummary: Guy de Beauchamp 10th Earl of Warwick(이)가 1272년 영국 워스스터실르 엘리 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Beauchamp 9th Earl of Warwick(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud FitzJohn(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1305년 이전 Alice de Tosny(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1300년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1298년, 26세의 나이로 그의 직업은 high sheriff of worcestershire 이었다. 그는 1315년 8월 12일 영국 워윅실르 워윅 워윅 카스틀에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 볼데슬리 박에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guy de Beauchamp 10th Earl of Warwick nasceu em 1272, em Elmley Castle, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Beauchamp 9th Earl of Warwick, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Maud FitzJohn, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice de Tosny antes 1305. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1300. Em 1298, com 26 anos, sua profissão aparece como high sheriff of worcestershire . Ele faleceu em 12 de agosto de 1315, em Warwick Castle, Warwick, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, com 43 anos, e foi sepultado em Bordesley Park, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Warwick Castle, Warwick, Warwickshire, E: варвикк кастл, варвикк, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guy de Beauchamp 10th Earl of Warwick родился в 1272 г. в местности элмли кастл, ворсестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Beauchamp 9th Earl of Warwick было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud FitzJohn, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice de Tosny перед 1305 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. В 1300 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1298 году, в возрасте 26 лет, работал по профессии high sheriff of worcestershire . Он умер 12 августа 1315 г. в местности варвикк кастл, варвикк, варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 43 лет и был похоронен в местности бордесли парк, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guy de Beauchamp 10th Earl of Warwick nació en 1272, en Elmley Castle, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Beauchamp 9th Earl of Warwick, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Maud FitzJohn, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Alice de Tosny antes de 1305. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1300. En 1298, a la edad de 26 años, su ocupación registrada era high sheriff of worcestershire . Murió el 12 de agosto de 1315, en Warwick Castle, Warwick, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 43 años, y fue sepultado en Bordesley Park, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
